name: VanEck Uranium and Nuclear Energy ETF
description: The VanEck Uranium and Nuclear Energy ETF (NLR) seeks to replicate as closely as possible, before fees and expenses, the price and yield performance of the MVIS Global Uranium & Nuclear Energy Index. The fund invests in companies involved in uranium mining, the construction and maintenance of nuclear power facilities, and the production of electricity from nuclear sources. By providing exposure to the entire nuclear energy ecosystem, NLR offers investors a way to participate in the growth of carbon-free baseload power generation and the increasing global demand for nuclear fuel and infrastructure.
